summary: The Cochise County Board of Supervisors voted to follow the orders of a judge who ruled that they broke the law when they refused to sign off on the vote count by this week’s deadline.

title: Biden administration delays release of new environmental review for ANWR drilling
summary: All oil development work in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge is effectively stalled until the new review process concludes.

title: Special master review in Mar-a-Lago case struck down by appeals court
summary: A three-judge panel, including two Donald Trump appointees, said Judge Aileen Cannon erred in appointing a special master to review documents seized by the FBI.

title: Victim in East Anchorage killing was a 12-year-old girl
summary: A suspect police described only as a “male juvenile” was in custody at McLaughlin Youth Center as of Wednesday evening.

title: EPA regional administrator recommends killing Pebble mine, setting stage for final veto
summary: The EPA administrator for the region that includes Alaska advanced the agency’s veto proposal to the agency’s headquarters. The move means a final decision would be made by February.

title: Letter bombs strike Spain, including premier’s office, U.S. and Ukraine embassies
summary: Spain has boosted security around public buildings and diplomatic missions after a string of letter bombs were discovered this week, including one that injured an employee of the Ukrainian Embassy.

title: McCarthy says Republicans will investigate Jan. 6 committee’s work
summary: House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy vowed Republicans would launch their own inquiry into “why the Capitol complex was not secure” on the day a pro-Trump mob stormed the Capitol.

title: Prince William and Princess Kate visit US amid new allegations of racism among UK royals
summary: William’s office said “racism has no place in our society” as he sought to prevent the backlash over his godmother’s treatment of a Black woman from overshadowing his trip.

title: Defending champ Sass, past winner Kaiser among entrants at Iditarod sign-up deadline
summary: Thirty-four mushers have registered so far for the 2023 race, which would make the field among the smallest in history.

summary: French President Emmanuel Macron’s arrival Tuesday kicked off the first state visit of Biden’s presidency, which includes a lavish official dinner Thursday night.

summary: Gardening columnist Jeff Lowenfels promises Mary Peltola’s staff that his suggestions are easy to care for.

summary: The Iranian government has stepped up its efforts to kidnap or kill government officials, activists and journalists around the world, alarming Western officials.

summary: None of Alaska’s 62 legislative and statewide races changed leaders as members of the multipartisan state review board examined unofficial results for accuracy.

summary: The charges stem from incidents said to have taken place between 2001 and 2003 - right in the middle of Masterson’s best-known role on “That ‘70s Show.”

title: Biden pledges new commitments, respect for tribes
